name: Funnel Cake Mix Recipe:
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir well until fully mixed.
2. Store mixture in an airtight container.
To make Funnel Cakes:
1. Pour vegetable oil into a round heavy pot to a depth of one inch.
2. Heat the oil over medium-high heat (it may need to be higher).
3. In a small bowl, whisk together 1 egg and 3/4 cup milk.
4. Add 1 cup of Funnel Cake Mix to the egg mixture and beat with a fork until smooth.
5. Hold your finger under the funnel opening, pour about 1/4 cup of batter into the funnel.
6. Allow the batter to pour from the funnel into the hot oil, moving the funnel in a circular motion to form a spiral shape.
7. Fry for 1 minute on each side, turning once, until golden brown.
8. Remove the cakes with tongs and drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar or a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
10. Makes 6 Funnel Cakes.
